1.description: API-only triage agent. Fills the seven UC-5-owned fields on an open incident or the four UC-5-owned fields on an open service request: category, subcategory (incident only), impact (incident only), urgency (incident only), priority, assignment_group, assigned_to. Bound to the operator-driven /api/uc05/{queue-summary,queue,propose,decide} surface and the NATS subjects oneops.uc05.triage.{propose,decide,applied}; not reachable from the conversational router (no chat intent maps to it).

skills.name: Triage a ticket
skills.description: Classify, prioritize, near-duplicate-check, and recommend assignment for an open incident or request - proposing values for the UC-5-owned fields (category, subcategory, impact, urgency, priority, assignment_group, assigned_to). Action-tier: proposals require operator confirmation before they are applied. Operator-/API-driven only (queue surface and NATS subjects); not reachable from the conversational chat router. NOT for summarizing the ticket, fetching KB/how-to articles, or finding similar tickets as an end goal.
use_when: the operator wants a ticket classified, categorized, or sub-categorized
the operator wants impact, urgency, or priority assessed for a ticket
the operator wants a recommended assignment group or assignee for a ticket
the operator wants a triage proposal assembled for review and decision
the operator wants a near-duplicate check as part of triaging a ticket
not_when: the user wants the ticket's existing facts, fields, or timeline (route to uc01_summarization)
the user wants knowledge, documentation, how-to, or KB articles (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
the user wants other tickets similar to or duplicates of this one as an end goal (route to uc02_similar_tickets)
the user wants to create or fulfil a new request (route to an action/fulfilment agent)
the request arrives from the conversational chat router (this agent is API/operator-only)
the user seeks guidance or solutions for resolving an incident or request (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
examples: what category and priority should this incident be
recommend an assignment group for this request
assemble a triage proposal for INC0001021
who should this incident be assigned to
assess impact and urgency for this ticket
